nodes.name: 鹭科
nodes.summary: 鹭科（Ardeidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联57种鸟类，如白冠虎斑鷺、横纹虎鹭、船嘴鹭等57种鸟类。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 河口
nodes.summary: 淡水与海水交汇形成的高生产力边缘生态系统。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 船嘴鹭
nodes.summary: 船嘴鹭（Boat-billed heron，学名 Cochlearius cochlearius），分类上属于鹈形目，并归入鹭科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括沼泽、海岸湿地、河口。

nodes.name: 鹈形目
nodes.summary: 鹈形目（Pelecaniformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联93种鸟类，如朱鹮、黑脸琵鹭、Plumbeous ibis等93种鸟类。

nodes.name: 海岸湿地
nodes.summary: 海湾、泻湖、盐沼与河口组成的复合湿地。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It lives in mangrove swamps from Mexico south to Peru and Brazil

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Boat-billed herons have a huge native range that reaches from Mexico to Peru, Brazil, and northeastern Argentina. They are nonmigratory birds that tend to live in seasonal lagoons and estuaries, and nest in mangroves. thumb|The Tuxtla Statuette, a 2nd-century AD sculpture, is carved in the form of a boat-billed heron

links.label: 栖息于

They are nonmigratory birds that tend to live in seasonal lagoons and estuaries, and nest in mangroves. thumb|The Tuxtla Statuette, a 2nd-century AD sculpture, is carved in the form of a boat-billed heron
